body.title: /health + /metrics endpoint: liveness probe for unattended Igor
body.result: Added GET /health and GET /metrics (plus /api/* aliases) to web/server.py. /health returns {status, uptime_s, last_input_ago_s, active_threads, dead_daemons} — status is 'degraded' if any daemon supervisor thread is dead. /metrics returns SRE snapshot: swap_pct from /proc/meminfo, daemon thread status, Igor stats (memory_count, session_cost, tier, busy). _last_input_ts updated on every cc_send and WebSocket message.
body.description: Igor's web server (port 8080) has no /health or /metrics endpoint. A hung process is indistinguishable from a healthy one. Fix: add GET /health (returns 200 + {status, turn_id, last_input_ms, uptime_s}) updated every turn; add GET /metrics (turn count, tier escalation rates, cortex query latency, swap %, active threads). Updated from the turn path, never blocking. SRE finding from deep-audit Panel 11. Akien specifically called this out as high value.
